name: canshare-tnm8-neuroendocrine-gi-pm
title: NZ AJCC (8th edition) neuroendocrine gastrointestinal pathological M category
description: A pathological distant metastasis stage (pM) of a neuroendocrine gastrointestinal tumour before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (8th edition).
